step_description: Locate AWR snapshot bracket for requested time window
narrative_hint: Three AWR snapshots bracket the 6PM incident window. Snap IDs 8820-8821 cover 17:30-18:30 which is the most relevant range. Claude should confirm the time window is correctly identified and proceed to awr_wait_delta using snap_id 8820 as begin and 8821 as end to capture the peak of the incident. The 30-minute snapshot interval means granularity is coarse but sufficient to identify dominant wait events.
